name: Total Image Limousine Svc

Original limo business started 6/1/1996; BBB file opened 1/28/1991. Inc 12/7/2020 reflects the corporate vehicle currently operating the business. Owner Eric Bilger; Operations Manager John R. Davidson. Also holds PUCO 650196 and MCC 1160117 per company website. Fleet is Lincoln town cars, stretch limos, Ford Excursions, 16-pax limo bus - airport/wedding/charter focus, not school bus.
